title: Loot & Explore - RPG Series Loot Compat
description: Datapack for Modpack Devs. This Datapack adds the Loot&Explore Weapons to the RPG Series Loot Tags.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IP1r8g0z/images/cfb19759e621017d0e5db45f0ee3a0457b645fb5.png)

### 🚨Required Mods
- [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore)

This optional datapack was mainly created for Modpack Devs, enables the craftable Loot & Explore Weapons in the RPG Series Loot Injection if this is wanted.

![Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IP1r8g0z/images/46dbb0b7a07195bd50119e5da6fc0aad8093c3ec.png)

**The following exclusive Weapon Themes gets injected with this datapack:**
- Ocean - Elder Guardian Weapons
- End - Ender Dragon Weapons
- Nether - Wither Weapons
- Frozen - Frost Monarch
